'''Dana''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] who served as an intelligence agent with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]].

==Biography==
Dana was partnered with the [[Tarro]] operative [[Kassar Kosciusko]], and the pair operated on [[Kwenn Space Station/Legends|Kwenn Space Station]].<ref name="CRO">''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]''</ref> Some [[Standard month/Legends|months]] prior to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Dana infiltrated the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Relentless (Dorja)|''Relentless'']], working undercover as an [[Ensign/Legends|ensign]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]]. After three months aboard, Dana was assigned to the warship's [[Captain/Legends|Captain]], [[Ranif Parlan|Parlan]], as an assistant. In this capacity, Dana gathered information for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]].<ref name="TM" />

Soon after the destruction of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]], Captain Parlan [[Battle in the Dalchon system|captured]] a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] named [[Quist (pirate)|Quist]] during an operation in the [[Dalchon system/Legends|Dalchon system]]. The prisoner, in order to avoid execution, bargained for his life by offering to reveal information pertaining to the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] tactician [[Adar Tallon/Legends|Adar Tallon]]. Though many people believed that Tallon had [[Death/Legends|died]] battling pirates in the Dalchon system [[Standard year/Legends|years]] prior, Quist knew that Tallon was alive and hiding out on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].<ref name="TM" />

The Rebels remembered and respected Tallon as a hero of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], and his tactics were used by Rebel pilots. However, the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] wanted to capture Tallon. To achieve this, Parlan called upon a number of [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]], including [[Jodo Kast]], and offered a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]], designation [[Imperial Bounty 82,471|82,471]], for the capture of Tallon.<ref name="TM" />

Upon learning of this, Dana jumped ship at [[Kwenn Space Station/Legends|Kwenn Space Station]] several [[Standard week/Legends|weeks]] before the mission was due to be completed to report her discoveries. She issued a [[Code Green]]—Agent in trouble, pick up immediately—which was responded to by the crew of the [[Starship/Legends|starship]] ''[[Alabak's Gold]]''. Unfortunately, another of Parlan's officers, [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Voor (lieutenant)|Voor]], discovered her disappearance. Jodo Kast tracked down Dana and killed her with one of his [[Poison dart/Legends|poison darts]] laced with [[Sennari/Legends|Sennari]]. The crew of the ''Alabak's Gold'' managed to retrieve Dana's body, and found the information she intended to pass on concerning Tallon encrypted on a [[Datapad/Legends|data storage pad]].<ref name="TM" />
